name: createRecord
code:
<?php


// fmCWP( host.domain, database, layout, user, password )
// $fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST, FM_DATABASE, FM_LAYOUT, FM_USER, FM_PASSWORD);

$fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST_DEMO, FM_DATABASE_DEMO, FM_LAYOUT_DEMO, FM_USER_DEMO, FM_PASSWORD_DEMO);


// Setting the parameters for the new record
$params = [
    "fieldData" => [
        "Title" => "Mr.",
        "First Name" => "Lawrence",
        "Last Name" => "Smith",
        "Job Title" => "Cobbler",
        "Company" => "Larry's Shoe Repair",
        "Website" => "google.com"
    ],
    // Partal Data To Be Added
    "portalData" => [
        "Phone Numbers" => [
            [
                "Phone Numbers::Type" => "Office",
                "Phone Numbers::Number" => "(800) 555-5555)",
            ],
            [
                "Phone Numbers::Type" => "Cell",
                "Phone Numbers::Number" => "(555) 555-5555)",
            ],
        ],

        "Email Addresses" => [
            [
                "Email Addresses::Type" => "Work",
                "Email Addresses::Address" => "lawrence@lectus.ca",
            ],
        ],

        "Addresses" => [
            [
                "Addresses::Type" => "Word",
                "Addresses::Address Line 1" => "123 Cobbler Way",
                "Addresses::Address Line 2" => "Unit 2",
                "Addresses::City" => "Cobbleton",
                "Addresses::State" => "KY",
                "Addresses::Postal Code" => "42104",
                "Addresses::Country" => "USA"
            ],
        ],
    ],

    // script to run AFTER
    "script" => "Log request",
    "script.param" => "Parameter from FMCWP Snippets - create record"
];

// Creating new record
$result = $fm->createRecord($params);

// Capture Response Array
$response = $fm->getResponse($result);

// Capture error
$error = $fm->isError($result) ;

// Display Result Message
if ( !$error ){ cwpSuccessMessage($response) ; } else { cwpErrorMessage($response) ; }

// Display Formatted response array
fmcwpShowResponse($response);

name: deleteRecord
code:
<?php


// fmCWP( host.domain, database, layout, user, password )
// $fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST, FM_DATABASE, FM_LAYOUT, FM_USER, FM_PASSWORD);

$fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST_DEMO, FM_DATABASE_DEMO, FM_LAYOUT_DEMO, FM_USER_DEMO, FM_PASSWORD_DEMO);


// Provide the record id of the record to delete
$id = 999;

// script to run AFTER
$params = [
    "script" => "Log request",
    "script.param" => "Parameter from fmCWP - delete record"
];

// Deleting record with ID 5 (field in the database - c_record_id)
$result = $fm->deleteRecord($id, $params);

// Capture Response Array
$response = $fm->getResponse($result);

// Capture error
$error = $fm->isError($result) ;

// Display Result Message
if ( !$error ){ cwpSuccessMessage($response) ; } else { cwpErrorMessage($response) ; }

// Display Formatted response array
fmcwpShowResponse($response);

name: duplicateRecord
code:
<?php


// fmCWP( host.domain, database, layout, user, password )
// $fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST, FM_DATABASE, FM_LAYOUT, FM_USER, FM_PASSWORD);

$fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST_DEMO, FM_DATABASE_DEMO, FM_LAYOUT_DEMO, FM_USER_DEMO, FM_PASSWORD_DEMO);


// Setting the optional parameters for the duplicating record. That can be checked in example database in layout data_log after the created record.
$params = [
    "script" => "Log request",
    "script.param" => "Parameter from FMCWP Snippets - duplicate record"
];

// Provide the record id of the record to duplicated
$id = 999;

// Duplicating record with ID provided
$result = $fm->duplicateRecord($id, $params);

// Capture Response Array
$response = $fm->getResponse($result);

// Capture error
$error = $fm->isError($result) ;

// Display Result Message
if ( !$error ){ cwpSuccessMessage($response) ; } else { cwpErrorMessage($response) ; }

// Display Formatted response array
fmcwpShowResponse($response);

name: editRecord
code:
<?php


// fmCWP( host.domain, database, layout, user, password )
// $fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST, FM_DATABASE, FM_LAYOUT, FM_USER, FM_PASSWORD);

$fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST_DEMO, FM_DATABASE_DEMO, FM_LAYOUT_DEMO, FM_USER_DEMO, FM_PASSWORD_DEMO);


// Set the record id
$id = 1;

// Setting parameters for editing - surname, email, personal identification number, product key for first row, version and date of expiration for second row will be edited
$params = [
    "fieldData" => [
        "First Name" => "Ron Glen",
        "Last Name" => "Cates",
        "Job Title" => "FileMaker Developer",
        "Company" => "RGC Data LLC",
        "Website" => "rgcdata.com",
    ],

    // Add or Edit portal data
    "portalData" => [
        "Phone Numbers" => [
            // Include Record ID to edit portal data
            [
                "recordId" => "1",
                "Phone Numbers::Type" => "Office",
                "Phone Numbers::Number" => "(270) 770-5871",
            ],
            // If there is no record id portal record will be created
            [
                "recordId" => "",
                "Phone Numbers::Type" => "Fax",
                "Phone Numbers::Number" => "(888) 888-8888",
            ],
        ],

        "Email Addresses" => [
            [
                "recordId" => "1",
                "Email Addresses::Type" => "Work",
                "Email Addresses::Address" => "ron@rgcdata.com",
            ],
        ],

        "Addresses" => [
            [
                "recordId" => "1",
                "Addresses::Type" => "Other",
                "Addresses::Address Line 1" => "",
                "Addresses::Address Line 2" => "",
                "Addresses::City" => "Bowling Green",
                "Addresses::State" => "KY",
                "Addresses::Postal Code" => "42104",
                "Addresses::Country" => "USA"
            ],
        ],
    ],

    // script to run AFTER
    "script" => "Log request",
    "script.param" => "Parameter from FMCWP Snippets - Edit record"
];

// Edit the record
$result = $fm->editRecord($id, $params);

// Capture Response Array
$response = $fm->getResponse($result);

// Capture error
$error = $fm->isError($result) ;

// Display Result Message
if ( !$error ){ cwpSuccessMessage($response) ; } else { cwpErrorMessage($response) ; }

// Display Formatted response array
fmcwpShowResponse($response);

name: findRecords
code:
<?php


// fmCWP( host.domain, database, layout, user, password )
// $fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST, FM_DATABASE, FM_LAYOUT, FM_USER, FM_PASSWORD);

$fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST_DEMO, FM_DATABASE_DEMO, FM_LAYOUT_DEMO, FM_USER_DEMO, FM_PASSWORD_DEMO);


// Setting up parameters for find record
$params = [

    // Build the find
    "query" => [
        [
            "Email Addresses::Address" => "==nu@gmail.com"
            //"omit" => "false"
        ],
        // New Request
        [
            "Email Addresses::Address" => "==ron@rgcdata.com"
            //"omit" => "false"
        ]
    ],

    // Number of records to return ( limit ) starting at ( offset )
    "limit"=>10,
    "offset"=>1,

    // Sort The Records
    "sort" => [
        [
            "fieldName" => "Last Name",
            "sortOrder" => "ascend",
        ],
    ],

    // Portal limit and offset perameters
    "limit.Email Addresses"=> 2,
    "offset.Email Addresses"=> 1,

    // script to run BEFORE the request
    "script.prerequest" => "Log request",
    "script.prerequest.param" => "Prerequest parameter from FMCWP Snippets - find record",

    // script to run BEFORE the sort
    "script.presort" => "Log request",
    "script.presort.param" => "Presort parameter from FMCWP Snippets - find record",

    // script to run AFTER
    "script" => "Log request",
    "script.param" => "Parameter from fFMCWP Snippets - find record",
    "layout.response"=> "Contact Details"


];

// Find the record with mail lawrence@lectus.ca
$result = $fm->findRecords($params);

// Capture Response Array
$response = $fm->getResponse($result);

// Capture error
$error = $fm->isError($result) ;

// Display Result Message
if ( !$error ){ cwpSuccessMessage($response) ; } else { cwpErrorMessage($response) ; }

// Display Formatted response array
fmcwpShowResponse($response);

name: getRecord
code:
<?php


// fmCWP( host.domain, database, layout, user, password )
// $fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST, FM_DATABASE, FM_LAYOUT, FM_USER, FM_PASSWORD);

$fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST_DEMO, FM_DATABASE_DEMO, FM_LAYOUT_DEMO, FM_USER_DEMO, FM_PASSWORD_DEMO);


// Setting up parameters for get record
$params= [

    // script to run BEFORE
    "script.prerequest" => "Log request",
    "script.prerequest.param" => "MyScriptPreRequestParameters",

    // script to run AFTER
    "script" => "Log request",
    "script.param" => "Parameter from FMCWP Snippets - get record",
    "layout.response"=> "Contact Details",

    // Portal sort and offset perameters
    //"_limit.USER_licence"=> ,
    //"_offset.USER_licence"=> 
    
];

// Set Record id
$id = 1;

// Get record by id with applied parameters
$result = $fm->getRecord($id, $params);

// Capture Response Array
$response = $fm->getResponse($result);

// Capture error
$error = $fm->isError($result) ;

// Display Result Message
if ( !$error ){ cwpSuccessMessage($response) ; } else { cwpErrorMessage($response) ; }

// Display Formatted response array
fmcwpShowResponse($response);

// Setting up parameters for get record

    "offset"=>1,

// Display Formatted response array
fmcwpShowResponse($response);

name: logout

name: runScript
code:
<?php


// fmCWP( host.domain, database, layout, user, password )
// $fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST, FM_DATABASE, FM_LAYOUT, FM_USER, FM_PASSWORD);

$fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST_DEMO, FM_DATABASE_DEMO, FM_LAYOUT_DEMO, FM_USER_DEMO, FM_PASSWORD_DEMO);


// Setting script parameters
$scriptParam =[
    "script.param"=>"Parameter from FM Snippets - run script"
];

// Run script
$result = $fm->runScript("Log request", $scriptParam);

// Capture Response Array
$response = $fm->getResponse($result);

// Capture error
$error = $fm->isError($result) ;

// Display Result Message
if ( !$error ){ cwpSuccessMessage($response) ; } else { cwpErrorMessage($response) ; }

// Display Formatted response array
fmcwpShowResponse($response);

name: setFileMakerLayout
code:
<?php


// fmCWP( host.domain, database, layout, user, password )
// $fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST, FM_DATABASE, FM_LAYOUT, FM_USER, FM_PASSWORD);

$fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST_DEMO, FM_DATABASE_DEMO, FM_LAYOUT_DEMO, FM_USER_DEMO, FM_PASSWORD_DEMO);


// Used to change layout if different from specified when making the connection
$fm->setFilemakerLayout("log");

name: setGlobalField
code:
<?php


// fmCWP( host.domain, database, layout, user, password )
// $fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST, FM_DATABASE, FM_LAYOUT, FM_USER, FM_PASSWORD);

$fm = new fmCWP(FM_HOST_DEMO, FM_DATABASE_DEMO, FM_LAYOUT_DEMO, FM_USER_DEMO, FM_PASSWORD_DEMO);


// Setting up the mandatory parameters for set global field
$params = [
    "globalFields" => [
        "Contacts::gGlobal1" => "123456789",
        "Contacts::gGlobal2" => "Global g_text is set up"
        
    ]
];

// Sets the values into the global fields
$result = $fm->setGlobalField($params);

// Capture Response Array
$response = $fm->getResponse($result);

// Capture error
$error = $fm->isError($result) ;

// Display Result Message
if ( !$error ){ cwpSuccessMessage($response) ; } else { cwpErrorMessage($response) ; }

// Display Formatted response array
fmcwpShowResponse($response);
